Custom Advent Pole Banners for Church Celebrations & Seasonal Worship

Advent pole banners are a powerful way to welcome your congregation and community during the Advent season. These double-sided vinyl pole banners are designed to display on light poles, street lamps, and church property, featuring messages of Hope, Peace, Love, and Joy that celebrate the season of preparation and worship.

Double-Sided Printing with Pole Pockets

Each Advent pole banner is printed on both sides so your message is visible from every direction. Banners include pole pockets at the top and bottom, along with grommets in all four corners, for secure attachment to pole-mounted bracket systems.

Customizable Advent Designs & Templates

Choose from a library of religious and seasonal Advent templates, or upload your own print-ready artwork. Our online designer lets you customize backgrounds, clip art, text, and images to create the perfect Advent banner for your church. If you need design assistance, our professional graphic designers can create custom artwork for your project.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Durable Vinyl Material Options for Advent Pole Banners

Every Advent pole banner is made with premium materials and printed using state-of-the-art, large-format printers for vibrant, weather-resistant colors. All banners are manufactured and printed in the USA.

Exact sizes of banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature-sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. The acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (e.g., a 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance). If your banner needs to be precise, please contact a Customer Service Representative to discuss your specific application.

13 oz Matte Vinyl Pole Banners

Our high-quality 13 oz matte vinyl banner material is the most popular option for Advent pole banners. It features a low-shine finish and a rich color gamut that brings Advent designs to life.

18 oz Heavy-Duty Vinyl Pole Banners

Our extra heavy-duty 18 oz matte vinyl banner material is the toughest option available. It features a low-luster finish with a blockout coating for enhanced durability and superior print quality -- ideal for Advent displays that need to withstand harsh winter weather conditions.

Request a free sample packet of materials.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Finishing & Hardware Options for Advent Pole Banner Installation

Print Size & Double-Sided Configuration

  • Maximum print size: 72" height x 36" width
  • All Advent pole banners are printed double-sided with pole pockets at the top and bottom
  • Grommets are included in all four corners for secure mounting

Bracket Systems for Pole Banner Mounting

Two hardware options are available for mounting Advent pole banners:

  • Standard Bracket System -- Recommended for banners up to 24" wide. For larger sizes, the wind-deflecting option is recommended.
  • Wind Deflecting Bracket System -- Designed for larger banners and high-wind environments, this hardware reduces wind load to extend the life of your Advent pole banners.

Advent pole banners are intended to be used with adjustable hardware. Most commercial banner hardware is adjustable. Banners.com does not recommend use with non-adjustable or stationary hardware and is not liable if the product does not fit. During the printing process, banners are heated and cooled, which may cause the material to expand or shrink slightly.

If you have questions about finishing or hardware compatibility, contact us at (320) 391-5300.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Production & Turnaround Times for Custom Advent Pole Banners

Flexible production time options let you choose the turnaround that fits your schedule. Production times range from two to five business days, giving you full control over when your Advent pole banners are ready to ship.

2 Business Days Express

Need your Advent pole banners quickly? The express production option delivers your completed banners in just two business days.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.
  • Emergency and same-day rush production is available in some cases. Contact a customer service representative for details.
  • Total delivery time includes both production time and shipping time.
  • Turnaround begins when the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in prepress or a proof is requested, turnaround begins upon approval.

3 Business Days Standard

The most popular turnaround option for Advent pole banners. Standard three-business-day production is fast enough for most seasonal timelines and included at no additional charge.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.
  • Emergency and same-day rush production is available in some cases. Contact a customer service representative for details.
  • Total delivery time includes both production time and shipping time.
  • Turnaround begins when the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in prepress or a proof is requested, turnaround begins upon approval.

5 Business Days Saver

Planning ahead for the Advent season? The five-business-day saver option provides the most cost-effective production timeline for your pole banners.

  • Orders received after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.
  • Emergency and same-day rush production is available in some cases. Contact a customer service representative for details.
  • Total delivery time includes both production time and shipping time.
  • Turnaround begins when the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in prepress or a proof is requested, turnaround begins upon approval.
PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Payment Methods for Advent Pole Banner Orders

All Advent pole banners must be paid for prior to entering production. The following payment methods are accepted:

  • Visa
  • MasterCard
  • American Express
  • Discover
  • Check (must be received before production begins)

Your credit card will not be charged until you have approved your order.

For more information about paying by check, visit our check payment guide.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping & Delivery for Advent Pole Banners

General Shipping Guidelines

For shipping questions, contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 prior to placing your Advent pole banner order. Unless otherwise specified, orders ship via UPS Ground with 1-3 day delivery to 90% of the United States.

A tracking number is provided once your package has shipped. Shipping prices are determined by package weight and destination. Additional shipping charges may apply for large orders.

After products have shipped, all shipping carrier terms and conditions apply for lost or delayed packages. Banner cost will not be refunded for carrier-caused delays. Delays due to natural disasters or circumstances beyond our control will not result in shipping refunds.

If a product is damaged in shipping, the damaged goods must be returned before a replacement is sent. Lost packages will be replaced after the carrier confirms the loss, which generally takes 7-10 business days after the initial scheduled delivery date.

Shipping Facility Locations

Vinyl & Mesh Banners: Produced in our Minnesota or Las Vegas facilities, whichever is most beneficial based on customer location and product specifications.

Fabric Banners: Produced in our Minnesota facility only.

Available Shipping Methods

  • Standard (3-5 Business Days)
  • Three Day (3 Business Days)
  • Two Day (2 Business Days)
  • Overnight (1 Business Day)
  • UPS Overnight AM
  • Economy Shipping (add 5-10 additional days depending on destination)

If choosing economy shipping, include additional postal information such as a P.O. Box in the "Address Two" field on the checkout page to help ensure delivery.

International Shipping

For international shipments, customers must provide both shipping labels and customs documentation. International shipping labels are accepted from USPS and UPS only. For details, contact our customer service team.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Popular Uses for Advent Pole Banners at Churches & Events

Advent pole banners are a versatile and eye-catching way to celebrate the Advent season and welcome your community. Here are some of the most popular ways churches and organizations display Advent pole banners:

  • Church Entrances & Parking Lots: Display Advent pole banners on light poles along your church property to greet members and visitors with seasonal messages of Hope, Peace, Love, and Joy.
  • Street & Sidewalk Poles: Mount Advent banners on public street poles (where permitted) to share your church's Advent message with the wider community.
  • Holiday & Seasonal Events: Use Advent pole banners to promote special church events, worship services, Christmas programs, and community gatherings during the Advent season.
  • Campus & School Displays: Christian schools and campus ministries can display Advent pole banners to create a welcoming seasonal atmosphere.
  • Community Celebrations: Towns and neighborhoods can use Advent-themed pole banners to mark the season along main streets and public gathering spaces.

Advent pole banners are made from weather-resistant vinyl that withstands outdoor winter conditions and lasts through the entire season and beyond.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Artwork Requirements for Advent Pole Banner Printing

File Format & Resolution Guidelines

Vector-based file types produce the best print results for Advent pole banners, such as .eps files with fonts converted to outlines. High-resolution .pdf and .jpg files are also accepted. If you are unsure about the quality of your files, our professional graphic designers can assist you.

Pole Banner Artwork Layout

For Advent pole banner artwork, keep all imagery and wording at least 1" in from where the pole pockets will be placed. This ensures your Advent design is fully visible once the banner is mounted.

Order Proofs & Approval Process

Requesting an order proof allows you to verify your Advent pole banner design before production. Your proof includes a low-resolution image of your artwork, a full order summary with pricing, and your billing and shipping information. If you request a proof, your order will not enter production until approval is received.

Color Match Proof System

For color-critical Advent banner projects, the Color Match Proof System is the best way to ensure accurate color reproduction. Contact a customer service representative for more details about this option.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Advent Pole Banners Online Today

Celebrate the Advent season with custom double-sided pole banners from Banners.com. Whether you're decorating your church entrance, lining a campus walkway, or welcoming your community along the street, our Advent pole banners deliver vibrant, weather-resistant displays that last season after season.

Choose from a wide selection of Advent templates featuring messages of Hope, Peace, Love, and Joy -- or upload your own custom artwork. Every Advent pole banner is printed on premium vinyl material using state-of-the-art large-format printers, manufactured entirely in the USA.

With flexible production times from 2 to 5 business days and multiple shipping options, you can get your Advent pole banners when you need them. Start designing your custom Advent pole banners today.

Why Choose Banners.com for Advent Pole Banners?

Customer Service
Our customer service team is 100% in-house and staffed by friendly, professional graphic designers ready to assist with your Advent banner project.

Fast Turnaround
Choose between 2, 3, or 5 business day production times to complete your Advent pole banner order on your schedule.

Quality Products
Every Advent pole banner is made with the finest materials available and printed using the latest large-format printing technology.

Live Order Tracking
Track your Advent pole banner order every step of the way with our proprietary Live Order Tracking system.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About Advent Pole Banners

What sizes are available for Advent pole banners?

Advent pole banners are available in heights from 12" to 72" and widths from 12" to 36". The maximum print size is 72" height by 36" width. If you need a custom size not listed, request a custom quote.

Are Advent pole banners printed on both sides?

Yes. All Advent pole banners are printed double-sided so your message is visible from both directions. Each banner includes pole pockets at the top and bottom and grommets in all four corners.

What material are Advent pole banners made from?

Advent pole banners are available in two vinyl options: 13 oz matte vinyl (most popular, with a low-shine finish and rich colors) and 18 oz heavy-duty matte vinyl (extra durable with a blockout coating for enhanced print quality and weather resistance).

What hardware do I need to hang Advent pole banners?

Advent pole banners are designed for use with adjustable pole-mounted bracket systems. Two options are available: the Standard Bracket System (recommended for banners up to 24" wide) and the Wind Deflecting Bracket System (recommended for larger banners and windy conditions).

Can I customize the design of my Advent pole banner?

Yes. You can choose from Advent-themed templates in our online designer, upload your own print-ready artwork files, or have our professional graphic designers create a custom design for you. Templates include religious and seasonal options with customizable backgrounds, clip art, text, and images.

How long does it take to receive Advent pole banners?

Production times range from 2 to 5 business days. Total delivery time includes production time plus shipping time. Standard UPS Ground shipping reaches 90% of the United States within 1-3 days. Expedited shipping options including overnight delivery are also available.

What file formats are accepted for Advent pole banner artwork?

Vector-based files (.eps with fonts converted to outlines) produce the best results. High-resolution .pdf and .jpg files are also accepted. Files should be 60 MB or smaller. For larger files, contact customer service for upload instructions.

Are Advent pole banners weather resistant?

Yes. Advent pole banners are made from durable vinyl material designed to withstand outdoor winter conditions. The 18 oz heavy-duty vinyl option provides extra durability with a blockout coating for extended outdoor use throughout the Advent and Christmas season.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
